response.justification: Candidate is wildly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 15+ years of experience including Staff and Senior positions at Naver and Tencent. While the technical fit is excellent (TypeScript, Node.js, React, fullstack, AI/LLM exposure, Kubernetes), there is significant risk of retention issues, salary mismatch, and lack of motivation for an entry-level role. Berlin location matches the on-site requirement. Worth a screening call to understand why a Staff Engineer is applying to a junior position.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience across Naver, Tencent, RIDE Capital
AI-agent infrastructure and MCP experience aligns with LLM nice-to-have qualifications
Berlin-based, matches high on-site presence requirement, plus basic German
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying to entry-level position
High flight risk and likely salary expectations mismatch with junior budget
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js explicitly listed; primary DB experience is MongoDB
